name: The Golfers Lounge Summerville
about: The Golfers Lounge is a golf simulator venue operating across three locations in South Carolina: West Ashley, Summerville, and Columbia. The facilities feature Trackman simulator technology, providing members with 24/7 access to a variety of virtual courses and training modes. Membership plans are available with different durations and pricing, offering benefits like free bay time, discounts on lessons, and access to 400-plus courses. The venue caters to both serious golfers seeking to improve their game and casual players looking for a social golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to top-of-the-line Trackman Simulator Technology
Free bay time for members with no hourly booking costs
Access to Shot Analysis mode with over 30 data points about swing and ball flight metrics
Variety of virtual courses including Pebble Beach, Bethpage Black, and Pinehurst No. 2

simulator_hardware.notes: Top of the line simulator technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to call ahead to inquire about club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.notes: The website mentions a full bar and kitchen food, but does not specify if outside food and drink are allowed. Please contact the venue directly for their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes. The duration can vary depending on the simulator software, number of players, and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, mentioning 'Putt putt, and easier entry point games for those with less Golf experience that you may want to bring along'.
